section_title: A "contract of guarantee" is a contract to perform the promise, or
content:
126. A "contract of guarantee" is a contract to perform the promise, or
guarantee",
discharge the liability, of a third person in case of his default. The person who
"surety",
"principal gives the guarantee is called the "surety": the person in respect of whose
debtor" and
default the guarantee is given is called the "principal debtor", and the person
"creditor"
to whom the guarantee is given is called the "creditor". A guarantee may be
either oral or written.
Consideration
